overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy exploring a snowy tribal settlement. The character walks through a mountain camp with teal tents, wooden structures, and NPCs gathered around fires, transitioning from lower camp areas to an ascending path toward an elevated structure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path through the lower camp area

notable_agents.action: standing near a workbench working on crafting

entered.detail: large teal-colored tent with wooden frame and blue glowing decorations
snow-covered rocky mountain formation rising behind the settlement
tall wooden pole with blue glowing light elements
colorful fabric banners strung between wooden poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the entrance of a snowy tribal settlement, passing teal tents and wooden totems with blue lights. The path winds through snow-covered ground with rocky mountain formations visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: central camp area with cooking fires

events.description: approaching active campfires with NPCs gathered around cooking areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the central settlement area passing NPCs sitting by fires

notable_agents.action: sitting on a log by the campfire, tending to cooking food

entered.detail: active fire pit with cooking spit and flames
rough-hewn log bench for seating around the fire

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the central camp area where NPCs sit around active cooking fires. Wooden benches and cooking stations line the path as the character walks through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with large tent canopies

events.description: entering area covered by large tent canopies with prayer banners overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under large tent structures adorned with colorful prayer banners

entered.detail: massive teal fabric canopy stretched over wooden support beams
strings of multicolored fabric flags hanging overhead between poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath large tent canopies that provide partial cover, with colorful prayer banners strung overhead. The lighting becomes slightly diffused under the fabric shelters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending mountain path to upper settlement

events.description: beginning to ascend the snowy slope toward the elevated tent structure

agents.ego_description: climbing up the snow-covered stone steps toward a prominent elevated structure

entered.detail: distinctive teal tent perched atop a rocky outcrop with wooden stairs leading up
snow-dusted stone stairs winding up the mountainside
steep snow-covered rock face bordering the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a snowy mountain path toward an elevated tent structure perched on a rocky outcrop. Stone steps lead upward as the settlement spreads out below, with the path narrowing between snow-covered rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy tribal settlement that transitions from a bustling camp entrance to a secluded mountain overlook. It begins by winding past teal tents and glowing blue totems set against a backdrop of rocky mountain formations. As the character moves deeper into the settlement, the scene opens into a central hub filled with NPCs gathered around active cooking fires and wooden benches. The path then shifts beneath large tent canopies and colorful prayer banners, where the lighting becomes diffused under the fabric shelters. Finally, the camera ascends a narrowing snowy path and stone steps, climbing toward an elevated tent structure perched on a rocky outcrop as the rest of the settlement spreads out below.
